records.m_Talk_ENG: Countless <color=#ffd34c>Miracles</color> lie dormant in the Holy Curia's secret library.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Countless <color=#ffd34c>Miracles</color> lie dormant in the Holy Curia's secret library.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Countless <color=#ffd34c>Miracles</color> lie dormant in the Holy Curia's secret library.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are clues that the church had been collecting long before the existence of the Administration was revealed to the public.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are clues that the church had been collecting long before the existence of the Administration was revealed to the public.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are clues that the church had been collecting long before the existence of the Administration was revealed to the public.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For instance, there is a grimoire that can cure stomachaches just by reading its passages out loud.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For instance, there is a grimoire that can cure stomachaches just by reading its passages out loud.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For instance, there is a grimoire that can cure stomachaches just by reading its passages out loud.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or even the will of a martyr who died after being falsely accused and shedding pure white blood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or even the will of a martyr who died after being falsely accused and shedding pure white blood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or even the will of a martyr who died after being falsely accused and shedding pure white blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since the establishment of the Holy Curia, the Dicastery for the Causes of Saints has pursued the whereabouts of Miracles through any means possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since the establishment of the Holy Curia, the Dicastery for the Causes of Saints has pursued the whereabouts of Miracles through any means possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since the establishment of the Holy Curia, the Dicastery for the Causes of Saints has pursued the whereabouts of Miracles through any means possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Moreover, no Miracle is weighed greater or lesser than another...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Moreover, no Miracle is weighed greater or lesser than another...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Moreover, no Miracle is weighed greater or lesser than another...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Therefore, the librarian of the secret library has a duty to preserve the Miracle itself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Therefore, the librarian of the secret library has a duty to preserve the Miracle itself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Therefore, the librarian of the secret library has a duty to preserve the Miracle itself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At times, they may seem insignificant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At times, they may seem insignificant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At times, they may seem insignificant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At other times, they are embarrassing to the point one wishes to completely erase the Miracles from the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At other times, they are embarrassing to the point one wishes to completely erase the Miracles from the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At other times, they are embarrassing to the point one wishes to completely erase the Miracles from the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nevertheless, the duty given to the librarian by the Lord is to preserve, not destroy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nevertheless, the duty given to the librarian by the Lord is to preserve, not destroy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nevertheless, the duty given to the librarian by the Lord is to preserve, not destroy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And so...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And so...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And so...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I offer a prayer of confession.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I offer a prayer of confession.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I offer a prayer of confession.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One young librarian finds herself in deep contemplation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One young librarian finds herself in deep contemplation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One young librarian finds herself in deep contemplation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She has in her hands a certain dessert <color=#ffd34c>recipe</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She has in her hands a certain dessert <color=#ffd34c>recipe</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She has in her hands a certain dessert <color=#ffd34c>recipe</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps this, too, could be a clue to a Miracle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps this, too, could be a clue to a Miracle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps this, too, could be a clue to a Miracle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why do You lead me into temptation...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why do You lead me into temptation...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why do You lead me into temptation...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will she continue to preserve the Miracle with her collected reason and faith?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will she continue to preserve the Miracle with her collected reason and faith?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will she continue to preserve the Miracle with her collected reason and faith?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or will she deny the Miracle she has witnessed out of personal feelings and destroy it herself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or will she deny the Miracle she has witnessed out of personal feelings and destroy it herself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or will she deny the Miracle she has witnessed out of personal feelings and destroy it herself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please forgive my being unscrupulous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please forgive my being unscrupulous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please forgive my being unscrupulous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That holy night, when the world was covered in pure white snow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That holy night, when the world was covered in pure white snow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That holy night, when the world was covered in pure white snow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Miracle that occurred on that holy night lies solely in the hands of this young librarian...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Miracle that occurred on that holy night lies solely in the hands of this young librarian...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Miracle that occurred on that holy night lies solely in the hands of this young librarian...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sacred Mission Code <color=#ffd34c>X12MAS25</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sacred Mission Code <color=#ffd34c>X12MAS25</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sacred Mission Code <color=#ffd34c>X12MAS25</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A.K.A, <color=#ffd34c>The Holy Night Chocolate Mousse Cake Incident</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A.K.A, <color=#ffd34c>The Holy Night Chocolate Mousse Cake Incident</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A.K.A, <color=#ffd34c>The Holy Night Chocolate Mousse Cake Incident</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It all started from that sweet yet horrendous dessert.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It all started from that sweet yet horrendous dessert.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It all started from that sweet yet horrendous dessert.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our Father, Who art in heaven...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our Father, Who art in heaven...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our Father, Who art in heaven...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hallowed be... Thy name...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hallowed be... Thy name...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hallowed be... Thy name...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, continue.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, continue.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, continue.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Erm, Thy kingdom come... Thy will be done... on earth... On earth...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Erm, Thy kingdom come... Thy will be done... on earth... On earth...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Erm, Thy kingdom come... Thy will be done... on earth... On earth...

records.m_Talk_ENG: As it is in the sea... where the waves roll gently for all to see...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: As it is in the sea... where the waves roll gently for all to see...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: As it is in the sea... where the waves roll gently for all to see...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I got it! Right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I got it! Right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I got it! Right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oww...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oww...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oww...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I expected such, but I am still baffled by your stupidity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I expected such, but I am still baffled by your stupidity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I expected such, but I am still baffled by your stupidity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have been at the church all this time, but why is it that you have not even memorized the basic prayers?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have been at the church all this time, but why is it that you have not even memorized the basic prayers?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have been at the church all this time, but why is it that you have not even memorized the basic prayers?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, what good do prayers even do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, what good do prayers even do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, what good do prayers even do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I pray, do the C.O.s hit me more gently?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I pray, do the C.O.s hit me more gently?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I pray, do the C.O.s hit me more gently?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oww! Hey! You wanna have a go at me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oww! Hey! You wanna have a go at me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oww! Hey! You wanna have a go at me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our duty is to save the Lord's flock from the Corruption.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our duty is to save the Lord's flock from the Corruption.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our duty is to save the Lord's flock from the Corruption.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have I not told you several times already that running wild like a colt without reins is not your job?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have I not told you several times already that running wild like a colt without reins is not your job?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have I not told you several times already that running wild like a colt without reins is not your job?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I forgot. What are you gonna do about it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I forgot. What are you gonna do about it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I forgot. What are you gonna do about it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, you're such a snob. So anal about everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, you're such a snob. So anal about everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, you're such a snob. So anal about everything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Long Legs said that all we need to do is defeat C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Long Legs said that all we need to do is defeat C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Long Legs said that all we need to do is defeat C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well. The bishops in charge of the <color=#ffd34c>priest evaluation</color> will be stricter than me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well. The bishops in charge of the <color=#ffd34c>priest evaluation</color> will be stricter than me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well. The bishops in charge of the <color=#ffd34c>priest evaluation</color> will be stricter than me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Above all else...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Above all else...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Above all else...

records.m_Talk_ENG: please refrain from mention <color=#ffd34c>that man</color> in front of the other priests.
records.m_Talk_DEU: please refrain from mention <color=#ffd34c>that man</color> in front of the other priests.
records.m_Talk_FRA: please refrain from mention <color=#ffd34c>that man</color> in front of the other priests.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For I might have to bring down judgment myself if you do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For I might have to bring down judgment myself if you do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For I might have to bring down judgment myself if you do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. You couldn't have said it better. You think that will scare me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. You couldn't have said it better. You think that will scare me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. You couldn't have said it better. You think that will scare me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Looper, I have read everything about you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Looper, I have read everything about you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Looper, I have read everything about you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I noticed that you have failed to pass the priest evaluation twice already.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I noticed that you have failed to pass the priest evaluation twice already.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I noticed that you have failed to pass the priest evaluation twice already.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what?

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to the records, you bit off the priest's ear off during your evaluation... Is this true?
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to the records, you bit off the priest's ear off during your evaluation... Is this true?
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to the records, you bit off the priest's ear off during your evaluation... Is this true?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because that geezer did me wrong first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because that geezer did me wrong first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because that geezer did me wrong first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What else was I supposed to do when that jerk kept criticizing me about being a pagan child for no reason?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What else was I supposed to do when that jerk kept criticizing me about being a pagan child for no reason?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What else was I supposed to do when that jerk kept criticizing me about being a pagan child for no reason?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I gave him a reason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I gave him a reason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I gave him a reason.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No reason, you say... I would be more than happy to rephrase.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No reason, you say... I would be more than happy to rephrase.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No reason, you say... I would be more than happy to rephrase.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The report states that you were chewing on bubblegum instead of the communion during mass.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The report states that you were chewing on bubblegum instead of the communion during mass.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The report states that you were chewing on bubblegum instead of the communion during mass.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh. That's because my stomach gets upset whenever I chew that dough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh. That's because my stomach gets upset whenever I chew that dough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh. That's because my stomach gets upset whenever I chew that dough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who cares? They say that it's the heart that counts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who cares? They say that it's the heart that counts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who cares? They say that it's the heart that counts.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
So, it doesn't matter if I chew on dough, gum, or that jerk's ear
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
So, it doesn't matter if I chew on dough, gum, or that jerk's ear
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
So, it doesn't matter if I chew on dough, gum, or that jerk's ear
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Owwww...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Owwww...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Owwww...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am surprised that you were not excommunicated on the spot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am surprised that you were not excommunicated on the spot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am surprised that you were not excommunicated on the spot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! What's your problem? What's so important about that evaluation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! What's your problem? What's so important about that evaluation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! What's your problem? What's so important about that evaluation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you really think passing that test will suddenly make me super religious?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you really think passing that test will suddenly make me super religious?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you really think passing that test will suddenly make me super religious?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't care about anything as long as I can cut up C.O.s, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't care about anything as long as I can cut up C.O.s, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't care about anything as long as I can cut up C.O.s, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surely. I suppose no one ever expects you to have any kind of genuine faith.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surely. I suppose no one ever expects you to have any kind of genuine faith.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surely. I suppose no one ever expects you to have any kind of genuine faith.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, the situation has changed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, the situation has changed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, the situation has changed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is all because of Benedict Constantine...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is all because of Benedict Constantine...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is all because of Benedict Constantine...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And Cardinal Johan, Chairman of the Miracle Investigation Council, passed away under unfortunate circumstances.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And Cardinal Johan, Chairman of the Miracle Investigation Council, passed away under unfortunate circumstances.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And Cardinal Johan, Chairman of the Miracle Investigation Council, passed away under unfortunate circumstances.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Keep angels close. But the devil closer.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Keep angels close. But the devil closer.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Keep angels close. But the devil closer.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Miracle Investigation Council is Holy Curia's anti-Corruption institution.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Miracle Investigation Council is Holy Curia's anti-Corruption institution.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Miracle Investigation Council is Holy Curia's anti-Corruption institution.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Due to the special nature of the organization, the Investigation Council prioritized recruiting Counters who are better at anti-C.O. warfare.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Due to the special nature of the organization, the Investigation Council prioritized recruiting Counters who are better at anti-C.O. warfare.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Due to the special nature of the organization, the Investigation Council prioritized recruiting Counters who are better at anti-C.O. warfare.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, His Eminence chose those who could fight immediately for the Lord...
records.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, His Eminence chose those who could fight immediately for the Lord...
records.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, His Eminence chose those who could fight immediately for the Lord...

records.m_Talk_ENG: prioritizing one's ability over one's background, character, faith, and even one's qualifications as a priest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: prioritizing one's ability over one's background, character, faith, and even one's qualifications as a priest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: prioritizing one's ability over one's background, character, faith, and even one's qualifications as a priest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to that, the Investigation Council was able to obtain the Administration's TASKFORCE license relatively early.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to that, the Investigation Council was able to obtain the Administration's TASKFORCE license relatively early.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to that, the Investigation Council was able to obtain the Administration's TASKFORCE license relatively early.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But on the other hand, we also gained an infamous nickname as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But on the other hand, we also gained an infamous nickname as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But on the other hand, we also gained an infamous nickname as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Mad Dogs of the Lord</color>...
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Mad Dogs of the Lord</color>...
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Mad Dogs of the Lord</color>...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, this is about me, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, this is about me, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, this is about me, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. At least you still have some sense, little one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. At least you still have some sense, little one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. At least you still have some sense, little one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Little one? I don't think that was a compliment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Little one? I don't think that was a compliment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Little one? I don't think that was a compliment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Sister Looper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no denying that you are a crucial asset to the Investigation Council.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no denying that you are a crucial asset to the Investigation Council.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no denying that you are a crucial asset to the Investigation Council.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, keep in mind that there are people who are displeased by the likes of you here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, keep in mind that there are people who are displeased by the likes of you here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, keep in mind that there are people who are displeased by the likes of you here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, the fact that you are the last survivor of a pagan community will never change.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, the fact that you are the last survivor of a pagan community will never change.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, the fact that you are the last survivor of a pagan community will never change.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, I'm sorry. Happy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, I'm sorry. Happy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, I'm sorry. Happy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you want me to do? Should I crawl back into my faceless mother's womb?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you want me to do? Should I crawl back into my faceless mother's womb?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you want me to do? Should I crawl back into my faceless mother's womb?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Investigation Council has suppressed the disgruntled voices of Holy Curia by providing meaningful results.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Investigation Council has suppressed the disgruntled voices of Holy Curia by providing meaningful results.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Investigation Council has suppressed the disgruntled voices of Holy Curia by providing meaningful results.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But since such an unfortunate incident has occurred, Holy Curia will take direct action.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But since such an unfortunate incident has occurred, Holy Curia will take direct action.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But since such an unfortunate incident has occurred, Holy Curia will take direct action.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Soon, they'll conduct a large-scale audit under this pretext.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Soon, they'll conduct a large-scale audit under this pretext.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Soon, they'll conduct a large-scale audit under this pretext.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An audit? What kind of audition are they holding?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An audit? What kind of audition are they holding?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An audit? What kind of audition are they holding?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I believe it will not be an issue to the majority of those who are doing their duty as an Inquisitorial Priest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I believe it will not be an issue to the majority of those who are doing their duty as an Inquisitorial Priest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I believe it will not be an issue to the majority of those who are doing their duty as an Inquisitorial Priest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But for a hopeless Sister who has failed the priest evaluation twice, it will be different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But for a hopeless Sister who has failed the priest evaluation twice, it will be different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But for a hopeless Sister who has failed the priest evaluation twice, it will be different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, do you realize how serious the situation is?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, do you realize how serious the situation is?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, do you realize how serious the situation is?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You might have been cut some slack as an apprentice priest, but you must pass the evaluation this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You might have been cut some slack as an apprentice priest, but you must pass the evaluation this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You might have been cut some slack as an apprentice priest, but you must pass the evaluation this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Holy Curia found out that one of their Sisters cannot even memorize prayers...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Holy Curia found out that one of their Sisters cannot even memorize prayers...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Holy Curia found out that one of their Sisters cannot even memorize prayers...

records.m_Talk_ENG: the Investigation Council will undoubtedly face its <color=#ffd34c>demise</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: the Investigation Council will undoubtedly face its <color=#ffd34c>demise</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: the Investigation Council will undoubtedly face its <color=#ffd34c>demise</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Specky Snob, can I ask you something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Specky Snob, can I ask you something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Specky Snob, can I ask you something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, it seems you have finally found the will to study the Bible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, it seems you have finally found the will to study the Bible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, it seems you have finally found the will to study the Bible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. It is also the will of the Lord not to turn away those who wish to learn.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. It is also the will of the Lord not to turn away those who wish to learn.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. It is also the will of the Lord not to turn away those who wish to learn.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will happily make you into a respectable Sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will happily make you into a respectable Sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will happily make you into a respectable Sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, ask away, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, ask away, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, ask away, Sister Looper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's a "demise"?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's a "demise"?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's a "demise"?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see. This will be a difficult sacred duty I must uphold.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see. This will be a difficult sacred duty I must uphold.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see. This will be a difficult sacred duty I must uphold.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Countless <color=#ffd34c>Miracles</color> lie dormant in the Holy Curia's secret library.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Countless <color=#ffd34c>Miracles</color> lie dormant in the Holy Curia's secret library.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Countless <color=#ffd34c>Miracles</color> lie dormant in the Holy Curia's secret library.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They are clues that the church had been collecting long before the existence of the Administration was revealed to the public.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They are clues that the church had been collecting long before the existence of the Administration was revealed to the public.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They are clues that the church had been collecting long before the existence of the Administration was revealed to the public.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For instance, there is a grimoire that can cure stomachaches just by reading its passages out loud.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For instance, there is a grimoire that can cure stomachaches just by reading its passages out loud.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For instance, there is a grimoire that can cure stomachaches just by reading its passages out loud.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or even the will of a martyr who died after being falsely accused and shedding pure white blood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or even the will of a martyr who died after being falsely accused and shedding pure white blood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or even the will of a martyr who died after being falsely accused and shedding pure white blood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since the establishment of the Holy Curia, the Dicastery for the Causes of Saints has pursued the whereabouts of Miracles through any means possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since the establishment of the Holy Curia, the Dicastery for the Causes of Saints has pursued the whereabouts of Miracles through any means possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since the establishment of the Holy Curia, the Dicastery for the Causes of Saints has pursued the whereabouts of Miracles through any means possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Moreover, no Miracle is weighed greater or lesser than another...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Moreover, no Miracle is weighed greater or lesser than another...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Moreover, no Miracle is weighed greater or lesser than another...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Therefore, the librarian of the secret library has a duty to preserve the Miracle itself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Therefore, the librarian of the secret library has a duty to preserve the Miracle itself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Therefore, the librarian of the secret library has a duty to preserve the Miracle itself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At times, they may seem insignificant.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At times, they may seem insignificant.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At times, they may seem insignificant.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At other times, they are embarrassing to the point one wishes to completely erase the Miracles from the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At other times, they are embarrassing to the point one wishes to completely erase the Miracles from the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At other times, they are embarrassing to the point one wishes to completely erase the Miracles from the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nevertheless, the duty given to the librarian by the Lord is to preserve, not destroy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nevertheless, the duty given to the librarian by the Lord is to preserve, not destroy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nevertheless, the duty given to the librarian by the Lord is to preserve, not destroy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And so...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And so...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And so...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I offer a prayer of confession.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I offer a prayer of confession.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I offer a prayer of confession.

root.m_Talk_ENG: One young librarian finds herself in deep contemplation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: One young librarian finds herself in deep contemplation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: One young librarian finds herself in deep contemplation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She has in her hands a certain dessert <color=#ffd34c>recipe</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She has in her hands a certain dessert <color=#ffd34c>recipe</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She has in her hands a certain dessert <color=#ffd34c>recipe</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps this, too, could be a clue to a Miracle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps this, too, could be a clue to a Miracle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps this, too, could be a clue to a Miracle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why do You lead me into temptation...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why do You lead me into temptation...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why do You lead me into temptation...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Will she continue to preserve the Miracle with her collected reason and faith?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Will she continue to preserve the Miracle with her collected reason and faith?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Will she continue to preserve the Miracle with her collected reason and faith?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or will she deny the Miracle she has witnessed out of personal feelings and destroy it herself?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or will she deny the Miracle she has witnessed out of personal feelings and destroy it herself?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or will she deny the Miracle she has witnessed out of personal feelings and destroy it herself?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please forgive my being unscrupulous.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please forgive my being unscrupulous.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please forgive my being unscrupulous.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That holy night, when the world was covered in pure white snow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That holy night, when the world was covered in pure white snow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That holy night, when the world was covered in pure white snow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Miracle that occurred on that holy night lies solely in the hands of this young librarian...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Miracle that occurred on that holy night lies solely in the hands of this young librarian...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Miracle that occurred on that holy night lies solely in the hands of this young librarian...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sacred Mission Code <color=#ffd34c>X12MAS25</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sacred Mission Code <color=#ffd34c>X12MAS25</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sacred Mission Code <color=#ffd34c>X12MAS25</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A.K.A, <color=#ffd34c>The Holy Night Chocolate Mousse Cake Incident</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A.K.A, <color=#ffd34c>The Holy Night Chocolate Mousse Cake Incident</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A.K.A, <color=#ffd34c>The Holy Night Chocolate Mousse Cake Incident</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It all started from that sweet yet horrendous dessert.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It all started from that sweet yet horrendous dessert.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It all started from that sweet yet horrendous dessert.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our Father, Who art in heaven...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our Father, Who art in heaven...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our Father, Who art in heaven...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hallowed be... Thy name...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hallowed be... Thy name...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hallowed be... Thy name...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please, continue.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please, continue.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please, continue.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Erm, Thy kingdom come... Thy will be done... on earth... On earth...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Erm, Thy kingdom come... Thy will be done... on earth... On earth...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Erm, Thy kingdom come... Thy will be done... on earth... On earth...

root.m_Talk_ENG: As it is in the sea... where the waves roll gently for all to see...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: As it is in the sea... where the waves roll gently for all to see...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: As it is in the sea... where the waves roll gently for all to see...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I got it! Right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I got it! Right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I got it! Right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oww...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oww...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oww...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I expected such, but I am still baffled by your stupidity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I expected such, but I am still baffled by your stupidity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I expected such, but I am still baffled by your stupidity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You have been at the church all this time, but why is it that you have not even memorized the basic prayers?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You have been at the church all this time, but why is it that you have not even memorized the basic prayers?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have been at the church all this time, but why is it that you have not even memorized the basic prayers?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, what good do prayers even do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, what good do prayers even do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, what good do prayers even do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I pray, do the C.O.s hit me more gently?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I pray, do the C.O.s hit me more gently?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I pray, do the C.O.s hit me more gently?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oww! Hey! You wanna have a go at me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oww! Hey! You wanna have a go at me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oww! Hey! You wanna have a go at me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our duty is to save the Lord's flock from the Corruption.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our duty is to save the Lord's flock from the Corruption.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our duty is to save the Lord's flock from the Corruption.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have I not told you several times already that running wild like a colt without reins is not your job?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have I not told you several times already that running wild like a colt without reins is not your job?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have I not told you several times already that running wild like a colt without reins is not your job?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I forgot. What are you gonna do about it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I forgot. What are you gonna do about it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I forgot. What are you gonna do about it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, you're such a snob. So anal about everything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, you're such a snob. So anal about everything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, you're such a snob. So anal about everything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Long Legs said that all we need to do is defeat C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Long Legs said that all we need to do is defeat C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Long Legs said that all we need to do is defeat C.O.s.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well. The bishops in charge of the <color=#ffd34c>priest evaluation</color> will be stricter than me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well. The bishops in charge of the <color=#ffd34c>priest evaluation</color> will be stricter than me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well. The bishops in charge of the <color=#ffd34c>priest evaluation</color> will be stricter than me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Above all else...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Above all else...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Above all else...

root.m_Talk_ENG: please refrain from mention <color=#ffd34c>that man</color> in front of the other priests.
root.m_Talk_DEU: please refrain from mention <color=#ffd34c>that man</color> in front of the other priests.
root.m_Talk_FRA: please refrain from mention <color=#ffd34c>that man</color> in front of the other priests.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For I might have to bring down judgment myself if you do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For I might have to bring down judgment myself if you do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For I might have to bring down judgment myself if you do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. You couldn't have said it better. You think that will scare me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. You couldn't have said it better. You think that will scare me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. You couldn't have said it better. You think that will scare me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Looper, I have read everything about you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Looper, I have read everything about you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Looper, I have read everything about you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I noticed that you have failed to pass the priest evaluation twice already.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I noticed that you have failed to pass the priest evaluation twice already.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I noticed that you have failed to pass the priest evaluation twice already.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, what?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, what?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, what?

root.m_Talk_ENG: According to the records, you bit off the priest's ear off during your evaluation... Is this true?
root.m_Talk_DEU: According to the records, you bit off the priest's ear off during your evaluation... Is this true?
root.m_Talk_FRA: According to the records, you bit off the priest's ear off during your evaluation... Is this true?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's because that geezer did me wrong first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's because that geezer did me wrong first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's because that geezer did me wrong first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What else was I supposed to do when that jerk kept criticizing me about being a pagan child for no reason?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What else was I supposed to do when that jerk kept criticizing me about being a pagan child for no reason?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What else was I supposed to do when that jerk kept criticizing me about being a pagan child for no reason?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, I gave him a reason.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, I gave him a reason.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, I gave him a reason.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No reason, you say... I would be more than happy to rephrase.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No reason, you say... I would be more than happy to rephrase.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No reason, you say... I would be more than happy to rephrase.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The report states that you were chewing on bubblegum instead of the communion during mass.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The report states that you were chewing on bubblegum instead of the communion during mass.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The report states that you were chewing on bubblegum instead of the communion during mass.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh. That's because my stomach gets upset whenever I chew that dough.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh. That's because my stomach gets upset whenever I chew that dough.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh. That's because my stomach gets upset whenever I chew that dough.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who cares? They say that it's the heart that counts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who cares? They say that it's the heart that counts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who cares? They say that it's the heart that counts.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
So, it doesn't matter if I chew on dough, gum, or that jerk's ear
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
So, it doesn't matter if I chew on dough, gum, or that jerk's ear
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
So, it doesn't matter if I chew on dough, gum, or that jerk's ear
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Owwww...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Owwww...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Owwww...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am surprised that you were not excommunicated on the spot.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am surprised that you were not excommunicated on the spot.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am surprised that you were not excommunicated on the spot.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! What's your problem? What's so important about that evaluation?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! What's your problem? What's so important about that evaluation?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! What's your problem? What's so important about that evaluation?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you really think passing that test will suddenly make me super religious?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you really think passing that test will suddenly make me super religious?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you really think passing that test will suddenly make me super religious?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't care about anything as long as I can cut up C.O.s, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't care about anything as long as I can cut up C.O.s, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't care about anything as long as I can cut up C.O.s, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Surely. I suppose no one ever expects you to have any kind of genuine faith.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Surely. I suppose no one ever expects you to have any kind of genuine faith.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Surely. I suppose no one ever expects you to have any kind of genuine faith.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, the situation has changed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, the situation has changed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, the situation has changed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is all because of Benedict Constantine...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is all because of Benedict Constantine...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is all because of Benedict Constantine...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And Cardinal Johan, Chairman of the Miracle Investigation Council, passed away under unfortunate circumstances.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And Cardinal Johan, Chairman of the Miracle Investigation Council, passed away under unfortunate circumstances.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And Cardinal Johan, Chairman of the Miracle Investigation Council, passed away under unfortunate circumstances.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Keep angels close. But the devil closer.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Keep angels close. But the devil closer.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Keep angels close. But the devil closer.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Miracle Investigation Council is Holy Curia's anti-Corruption institution.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Miracle Investigation Council is Holy Curia's anti-Corruption institution.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Miracle Investigation Council is Holy Curia's anti-Corruption institution.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Due to the special nature of the organization, the Investigation Council prioritized recruiting Counters who are better at anti-C.O. warfare.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Due to the special nature of the organization, the Investigation Council prioritized recruiting Counters who are better at anti-C.O. warfare.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Due to the special nature of the organization, the Investigation Council prioritized recruiting Counters who are better at anti-C.O. warfare.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, His Eminence chose those who could fight immediately for the Lord...
root.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, His Eminence chose those who could fight immediately for the Lord...
root.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, His Eminence chose those who could fight immediately for the Lord...

root.m_Talk_ENG: prioritizing one's ability over one's background, character, faith, and even one's qualifications as a priest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: prioritizing one's ability over one's background, character, faith, and even one's qualifications as a priest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: prioritizing one's ability over one's background, character, faith, and even one's qualifications as a priest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to that, the Investigation Council was able to obtain the Administration's TASKFORCE license relatively early.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to that, the Investigation Council was able to obtain the Administration's TASKFORCE license relatively early.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to that, the Investigation Council was able to obtain the Administration's TASKFORCE license relatively early.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But on the other hand, we also gained an infamous nickname as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But on the other hand, we also gained an infamous nickname as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But on the other hand, we also gained an infamous nickname as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Mad Dogs of the Lord</color>...
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Mad Dogs of the Lord</color>...
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Mad Dogs of the Lord</color>...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, this is about me, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, this is about me, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, this is about me, isn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. At least you still have some sense, little one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. At least you still have some sense, little one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. At least you still have some sense, little one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Little one? I don't think that was a compliment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Little one? I don't think that was a compliment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Little one? I don't think that was a compliment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Sister Looper.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is no denying that you are a crucial asset to the Investigation Council.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is no denying that you are a crucial asset to the Investigation Council.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is no denying that you are a crucial asset to the Investigation Council.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, keep in mind that there are people who are displeased by the likes of you here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, keep in mind that there are people who are displeased by the likes of you here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, keep in mind that there are people who are displeased by the likes of you here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, the fact that you are the last survivor of a pagan community will never change.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, the fact that you are the last survivor of a pagan community will never change.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, the fact that you are the last survivor of a pagan community will never change.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, I'm sorry. Happy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, I'm sorry. Happy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, I'm sorry. Happy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you want me to do? Should I crawl back into my faceless mother's womb?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you want me to do? Should I crawl back into my faceless mother's womb?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you want me to do? Should I crawl back into my faceless mother's womb?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Investigation Council has suppressed the disgruntled voices of Holy Curia by providing meaningful results.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Investigation Council has suppressed the disgruntled voices of Holy Curia by providing meaningful results.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Investigation Council has suppressed the disgruntled voices of Holy Curia by providing meaningful results.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But since such an unfortunate incident has occurred, Holy Curia will take direct action.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But since such an unfortunate incident has occurred, Holy Curia will take direct action.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But since such an unfortunate incident has occurred, Holy Curia will take direct action.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Soon, they'll conduct a large-scale audit under this pretext.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Soon, they'll conduct a large-scale audit under this pretext.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Soon, they'll conduct a large-scale audit under this pretext.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An audit? What kind of audition are they holding?
root.m_Talk_DEU: An audit? What kind of audition are they holding?
root.m_Talk_FRA: An audit? What kind of audition are they holding?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I believe it will not be an issue to the majority of those who are doing their duty as an Inquisitorial Priest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I believe it will not be an issue to the majority of those who are doing their duty as an Inquisitorial Priest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I believe it will not be an issue to the majority of those who are doing their duty as an Inquisitorial Priest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But for a hopeless Sister who has failed the priest evaluation twice, it will be different.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But for a hopeless Sister who has failed the priest evaluation twice, it will be different.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But for a hopeless Sister who has failed the priest evaluation twice, it will be different.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, do you realize how serious the situation is?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, do you realize how serious the situation is?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, do you realize how serious the situation is?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You might have been cut some slack as an apprentice priest, but you must pass the evaluation this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You might have been cut some slack as an apprentice priest, but you must pass the evaluation this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You might have been cut some slack as an apprentice priest, but you must pass the evaluation this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If Holy Curia found out that one of their Sisters cannot even memorize prayers...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If Holy Curia found out that one of their Sisters cannot even memorize prayers...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If Holy Curia found out that one of their Sisters cannot even memorize prayers...

root.m_Talk_ENG: the Investigation Council will undoubtedly face its <color=#ffd34c>demise</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: the Investigation Council will undoubtedly face its <color=#ffd34c>demise</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: the Investigation Council will undoubtedly face its <color=#ffd34c>demise</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Specky Snob, can I ask you something?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Specky Snob, can I ask you something?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Specky Snob, can I ask you something?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, it seems you have finally found the will to study the Bible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, it seems you have finally found the will to study the Bible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, it seems you have finally found the will to study the Bible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. It is also the will of the Lord not to turn away those who wish to learn.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. It is also the will of the Lord not to turn away those who wish to learn.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. It is also the will of the Lord not to turn away those who wish to learn.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will happily make you into a respectable Sister.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will happily make you into a respectable Sister.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will happily make you into a respectable Sister.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, ask away, Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, ask away, Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, ask away, Sister Looper.
